reason: Tests assert exact variable name 'jsobjs_len' via regex and specific code patterns (e.g., 'const jsobjs_len: u32 = @intCast(jsobjs.len)'). Conveying this in instruction.md without leaking solution would require describing behavior without mentioning names the tests check for — but the tests regex for literal strings, not behavior. Additionally, tests_verify_behavior_not_text and test_not_tautological failures are test design problems (tests only do text pattern matching, never compile/execute), not fixable via instruction rewrite. solution_uniqueness_guard also fails because alternative variable names would fail the exact-string checks even if behaviorally equivalent.
